name: Quick Chicken Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breast halves, boned and skinless (1 lb total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry.
2. In a medium skillet, combine undrained tomatoes, mushrooms, onion, green pepper, wine, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper. Place the chicken on top of the vegetable mixture.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
4. Transfer the chicken to a serving platter and keep warm.
5. Stir together water and cornstarch in a small bowl. Add this mixture to the skillet and stir into the sauce. Cook, stirring, until thickened and bubbly.
6. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
